associativeOnly: Ligand-receptor inferences are co-expression signals, not observed physical interactions
Predicted signaling direction is a tool-derived score, not a mechanistic claim
requiresEvidence: Any communication edge claim must cite the tool, L-R database version, permutation count, and significance threshold
Cross-condition communication shifts must cite the donor-level aggregation and multiple-testing correction used
